title: Prompt Optimizer
description: Takes a rough or vague prompt and turns it into a sharp, ready-to-use Claude prompt using the RTCCF format.
longDescription:
Prompt Optimizer is a Claude Code skill that critiques a draft prompt and rewrites it using the RTC(C)F framework: Role, Task, Context, Constraints (only when needed), and Format. It helps anyone at Budget Thuis get better, more consistent results from Claude — without needing to understand prompt engineering.

The skill is advisory only: it never executes the task itself, only returns an improved prompt you can copy and run. Works for everything from writing copy to summarising documents to generating code.
